normalizations.reason: Uploaded token text says not to use ADL-024, but its own comment, Section L, 6c_operations/subsurface decomposition, and management intent confirm attendance time windows carry ADL-024.
Clarifies the intended boundary: 6C may model attendance-certificate evidence, while LMS certification output remains deferred to 6D.

decisions.original_comment: real runtime after Gate 3 (6C is operations 6B depends-forward-from; not scaffold-only)
decision register → schema/control → scaffold/control → FFET pack → Gate-2 → Gate-3 → autonomous
Prisma models in schema-control BEFORE runtime FFETs; runtime never edits schema (scope-creep guard)
like 6B v21; do not modify package scripts
business relations are FK; JSON never carries a business fact
employee extends core Person; no own identity
link to Person when known; contact-only before identity resolution

decisions.original_comment: CRM lead retained; applicant references it
Workspace is not a hard dep of recruitment (doc L77)
offer approval configurable; access provisioning via Gatekeeper
acceptance recommends employee creation; creation is an explicit step
provision via events, not a build-time dependency
background checks: no real provider/credentials in 6C

decisions.original_comment: calc / deferred release / clawback reversal / tier accelerator / pool distribution
channels, DMs, threads, mentions, reactions, attachments, read receipts
NO real-time transport infra in 6C runtime (scope-creep guard)
soft-delete + tombstone; staged permanent deletion rules apply
prohibited fields: message body of private/DM channels, redacted-sensitive content; no 6F dependency now
dependency logic in scope; visual Gantt is a screen/UI concern
budgets read-only; no direct Finance writes
Google/Outlook sync = boundary, no real adapter/credentials in 6C
default hard-block on resource conflict, warn on soft overlap
Workspace Calendar dependency where present (doc 6C.08 dep on 6C.07)
Events never write CRM directly (doc L23)
cancellation state in 6C; refund executed by 6B
event / session / ticket-type capacity, configurable per event
update via CRM-owned handler, not direct write
prohibited: attendee contact PII, payment internals
announcements, reminders, recruitment, event, workspace notifications

decisions.original_value: HIGH_RISK = offboarding, access revocation, commission clawback, private-channel access grant, irreversible deletion → Gatekeeper

decisions.original_comment: incl. any schema change — capture as schema-control doc (scope-creep guard)
AI Business Consultant out of scope (6F)
advanced admin/support/design polish out of scope (6F)
HR must not own global Person identity
Events must not bypass CRM/Finance/Communication Gateway
Workspace must not own HR employee records
real provider credentials/secrets out of scope unless separately approved
